summary: NeXifyAI Commercial System Iteration 15 E2E testing complete. All 22 backend API tests passed. Frontend verified: Pricing section (2 tariffs: Starter 499, Growth 1.299 with correct upfront amounts), Services section (3 categories: Websites, Apps, KI Add-ons with 7 items), Trust section (DSGVO, EU AI Act, ISO, EU-Hosting), FAQ section (expandable questions), Footer (IBAN, Services/Trust links), Admin Commercial Dashboard (enhanced quote form with country, industry, notes fields), QuotePortal (accept/decline/revision buttons implemented). Fixed missing hashlib import in server.py for portal endpoint.

FAQ contains services info (websites, apps, bundles) ✓

seed_data_creation: Test quotes created during testing (prefixed with TEST_Iter15_Growth, TEST_Iter15_Starter, TEST_PDF_Iter15)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Commercial Engine v2.0 fully tested including NEW features since iteration 14: Enhanced quote form (country, industry, notes fields), QuotePortal with accept/decline/revision buttons, IBAN in footer, Services/Trust nav links. All pricing verified: Starter (499/mo, 11976 total, 3592.80 upfront, 349.30 recurring) and Growth (1299/mo, 31176 total, 9352.80 upfront, 909.30 recurring). Services: 7 services + 3 bundles. Compliance: 8 items + ISO gap analysis. FAQ: 17+ entries. Security headers: 6 headers. Cookie banner must be dismissed first when testing frontend. Fixed hashlib import issue in server.py.

mocked_apis_list: Revolut Merchant API — keys are test placeholders, orders will fail gracefully with bank_transfer fallback
mocked_apis.note: Revolut API returns fallback response as expected with test keys
